title: Llynfi Valley Angling Association’s Junior Fishing Competition - Stephen Kinnock - Labour MP for Aberafan Maesteg
h1: Llynfi Valley Angling Association’s Junior Fishing Competition
text_excerpt: Llynfi Valley Angling Association’s Junior Fishing Competition - Stephen Kinnock - Labour MP for Aberafan Maesteg Skip to main content Join Get Involved Donate Aberafan Maesteg Events Better Off Calculator Cost of Living Advice Booklet 2024 Parliament Shadow Minister for Immigration Shadow Minister for the Armed Forces Shadow Minister for Asia and the Pacific News Press & Articles Newsletter Annual Report Campaigns Pride In Place Upper Afan Valley Standing Up For Steel Floating Offshore Wind Contact Here to help Unacceptable Behaviour Policy About GDPR/Data Protection More Search Search the website Search Menu 28th April, 2026 Llynfi Valley Angling Association’s Junior Fishing Competition I went along to the Llynfi Valley Angling Association’s Junior Fishing Competition, and was blown away by the focus and dedication of the budding anglers.
